Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Vazken V. Agemian
Off Calendar Oct-29-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ESTATE OF JAMES PAOLA's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for leave to file second amended complaint is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
